mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evaluation_media (child_id, scale_id, media_type, object_key, note_text, uploader_user_id, status) VALUES (#{childId}, #{scaleId}, #{mediaType}, #{objectKey}, #{noteText}, #{uploaderUserId}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, child_id, scale_id, media_type, object_key, note_text, uploader_user_id, status FROM evaluation_media WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, child_id, scale_id, media_type, object_key, note_text, uploader_user_id, status FROM evaluation_media WHERE child_id = #{childId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, child_id, scale_id, media_type, object_key, note_text, uploader_user_id, status FROM evaluation_media WHERE child_id = #{childId} AND media_type = #{mediaType} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE evaluation_media SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
